_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4 chip 3). Captures CONTROLLABLE ARCHE per-tick in freeroam (after the town-arrival cutscene hands off control ~flip 4500). (A) arche_body: per-Flip read of the party LEADER's body via a global chain *(0x8a9b50+0x2784)=room_state -> +0x200c=leader slot -> +0x9f4=entity -> +0x40=body; reads worldX/Y/vel/facing/state/celfr + the entity code (==0xc35a confirms Arche). INDEPENDENT of which fn updates her -> shows the input->motion law directly. (B) arche_ai: hooks 0x47b990 (the EFFECT-band actor AI) reading code/state/cmd-block/ctrl-flag -- if it fires with code==0xc35a, she's still EFFECT-band-updated in freeroam; if not, her mover is elsewhere (a key finding). Input: nav+Z to ~4520 (reach freeroam), then RIGHT(id4) held every flip 4560..4760, idle, LEFT(id3) held 4820..5020. Run: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/freeroam-gt/trace-b.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/freeroam_arche_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames <4400..5200> --capture-frames <sampled>.

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_body
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Leader-chain to Arche's body. hops = [room_state 0x2784, leader-slot 0x200c, entity 0x9f4, body 0x40].

0x47b990.name: arche_ai
0x47b990._note: FUN_0047b990 EFFECT-band AI. Filter code==0xc35a offline. cmd block this+0x14854; state this+0x1422c; ctrl flag *(this+0x750)+0xd4.
